title: Bootstrap Configuration
description: MINIMAL bootstrap config for the Website Autopilot System. Only fields a human MUST provide (cannot be derived from the website or computed from the slug). Hermes reads the website and fills everything else via AI judgment.

_comment.description: Human-readable note about this bootstrap config.

slug.description: Structural namespace. Lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens. Drives folder names (/opt/{slug}-agent), env prefix ({SLUG}_), Cloudflare project name, and all path derivations.

domain.description: Bare domain name (no protocol). Example: 'acmeplumbing.com'. Used to derive gsc_property, email defaults, and base_url.

owner_name.description: Business owner or primary contact name.

admin.description: Owner's email for notifications and admin alerts. REQUIRED.

from_name.description: Display name for outbound emails. Default: '{site_name} SEO Agent'.

ip.description: VPS IP address for provisioning. Example: '192.168.1.100'.

ssh_user.description: SSH user for server access. Default: 'root'.

ssh_key_path.description: Path to SSH private key. Default: './connection/id_rsa'.

project_name.description: Cloudflare Pages project name. Default: slug value.

production_branch.description: Branch that triggers production deployment. Default: 'main'.

location.description: Geographic location for SERP queries. Default: 'United States'.

not_in_bootstrap.description: These fields are NOT part of the bootstrap config. They are filled automatically by the bootstrap-to-config.ps1 script or by Hermes via AI analysis.
auto_derived: site_name          -- extracted from website by analyze-website.ps1
site_description   -- extracted from website by analyze-website.ps1
git.*              -- standard defaults (main branch, origin remote, 'SEO Agent')
hermes_fills_via_ai_required: business.type         -- AI reads website, determines business type
business.niche        -- AI extracts market niche from content
hermes_fills_via_ai_optional: _note: this template does NOT generate a website (Flow A / Architecture Decision #2),
_note: so the following are OPTIONAL. Add them to site.config.json only with REAL
_note: values pulled from the imported site; never leave __HERMES_FILL__.
business.primary_color -- AI extracts from CSS/brand analysis
